title: NoCreeperDamage
description: Adds a gamerule which allows disabling creeper block damage, but keeps other mob griefing.
body:
NoCreeperDamage adds a new gamerule that can disable the block damage that creepers do. If you don't mind mob griefing but you're constantly covering up holes made up by creepers that don't burn in the sunlight, this mod is for you!

Creepers will still do damage to players and mobs with this mod.

Run this command to turn off creeper block damage:
```
/gamerule creeperBlockDamage false
```

_"If you would follow the rules that we have today, we would probably not add the creeper" - Jens Bergensten_
